data.title: In HelloNation, Real Estate Expert Ginny Fey Shares How to Simplify the Downsizing Journey
data.description: In Traverse City, Michigan on March 26, 2026, real estate expert Ginny Fey from Real Estate One discusses the transition for older adults from feeling overwhelmed to empowered during downsizing. Through HelloNation, Fey offers insight on the importance of strategic planning and appropriate assistance in this process.

data.title: HONEYWELL TO RELEASE FIRST QUARTER FINANCIAL RESULTS AND HOLD ITS INVESTOR CONFERENCE CALL ON THURSDAY, APRIL 23
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina - On March 26, 2026, Honeywell (stock symbol: HON) announced plans to release its financial results for the first quarter prior to Nasdaq Stock Market's opening on April 23. The company is set to host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. EDT on the same day. Additional presentation materials and webcast details will be available for interested parties to access.

data.title: Resolutions approved at DirectBooking Technology EGM, paving way for improved share capital setup.
data.description: Last week, a record-breaking number of 150,000 people attended the annual music festival held in downtown. Attendees enjoyed performances from over 50 artists across five stages. The event generated over $5 million in revenue for the local economy, with 80% of attendees coming from out of town. Security was tight with 300 security personnel on duty, resulting in only five reported incidents. This year's festival exceeded expectations and plans are already underway for next year's event.

data.title: PhaseV Bringing Integrated AI for Faster Clinical Trials to the Global Stage
data.description: PhaseV, a prominent player in the field of AI/ML for clinical development, has revealed plans to showcase the advancements in utilizing Causal AI/ML to enhance trial design, execution, and patient outcomes. This announcement was made in Boston on March 26, 2026. The company will be presenting these significant improvements in the upcoming spring and summer of 2026. This move signifies a shift towards more sophisticated AI implementation beyond the basic level. With a focus on leveraging Causal AI/ML technologies, PhaseV aims to drive tangible enhancements in clinical trial processes and ultimately improve patient results.

data.title: SurgePays Launches Managed Marketing Services Platform Across Nationwide Retail Network
data.description: It is anticipated that an in-store digital media platform will enhance customer acquisition efforts and generate fresh opportunities for high-margin recurring revenue.

data.title: COLLPLANT BIOTECHNOLOGIES REPORTS 2025 FINANCIAL RESULTS AND PROVIDES CORPORATE UPDATE
data.description: On March 26, 2026, in Rehovot, Israel, CollPlant Biotechnologies announced its latest developments. The company, listed on Nasdaq as CLGN, specializes in regenerative and aesthetics medicine. They focus on creating cutting-edge technologies and products using their non-animal-derived rhCollagen for tissue regeneration and medical aesthetics.

data.title: SEALSQ Well Positioned with Post-Quantum Chips and PKI to Support Wi-SUN Alliance Members in Building Quantum-Resilient Smart Meter Ecosystems Amid Rising Demand in Smart Energy
data.description: In Geneva, Switzerland on March 26, 2026, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES), a prominent player in semiconductors, Public Key Infrastructure (PKI), and post-quantum cryptography (PQC) technology, declared its preparedness to aid the Wi-SUN Alliance and its associates in combating the rising risks posed by quantum computing to smart energy systems. With cutting-edge post-quantum (PQ) chips and complete PKI services, SEALSQ is well-equipped to offer specialized advice and remedies for constructing pathways towards achieving complete quantum resilience in smart meter networks.

data.title: Neurocrine Biosciences Presents First Expert Consensus Recommendations for Tardive Dyskinesia in Long-Term Care Settings
data.description: A recent report outlines a structured method for screening, diagnosing, and treating tardive dyskinesia in long-term care facilities, incorporating the use of VMAT2 inhibitors. An expert panel has established this approach. Through a new post-hoc analysis called KINECT-PRO™, conducted in adults aged 65 years and above, significant patient-reported enhancements have been observed. This analysis showcases tangible improvements in clinical outcomes for this demographic group.

data.title: Amaze Holdings Announces Creator Commerce Media Platform, Designed to Unlock Data-Driven Revenue Streams
data.description: A company based in Newport Beach, California, called Amaze Holdings, Inc. (NYSE American: AMZE), specializing in creator-powered commerce, has unveiled its Creator Commerce Media Platform on March 26, 2026. This launch signifies a strategic move by the company to capitalize on its expanding collection of first-party commerce and audience data.

data.title: Hoth Therapeutics Deploys OpenClaw™ AI Platform to Accelerate Drug Discovery
data.description: On March 26, 2026, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, Hoth Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: HOTH), revealed the launch of OpenClaw™, an innovative AI-powered computational platform. This platform aims to speed up drug discovery processes and improve data-driven decision-making.

data.title: Sanya 2026 Ticketing System Launched: 118,000 Discounted Tickets on Sale Globally
data.description: In Sanya, China, on March 26, 2026, during the 30-day countdown press event for the 6th Asian Beach Games Sanya 2026, the ticketing system was unveiled. As of today, 118,000 reduced-price tickets for the public to attend the Games are up for grabs.

data.title: Volition Announces Abstract Demonstrating Risk Stratification in Lung Cancer Presented at the European Lung Cancer Conference
data.description: In Henderson, Nevada, on March 26, 2026, VolitionRx Limited (NYSE AMERICAN: VNRX) revealed that they shared an abstract at the European Lung Cancer Conference (ELCC) in Copenhagen, Denmark. The conference occurred this week and featured a poster that presented key findings from the research. Volition is recognized as a multi-national epigenetics company making significant strides in the medical field.

data.title: Fixing of Coupon Interest Rate
data.description: On March 26, 2026, a notice was issued to Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S bearing the announcement number 28/2026.

data.title: Imagine Pediatrics Releases First Annual Impact Report Demonstrating Proven Outcomes in Pediatric Value-Based Care
data.description: New data from Imagine Pediatrics based in Nashville, Tennessee, highlights how a 24/7 integrated virtual and in-home care approach has proven to enhance the well-being of children with special health care needs. According to the report released on March 26, 2026, this innovative care model has led to an increase in safe days spent at home for these children. By effectively merging virtual care with in-home services, the study demonstrates a significant reduction in the number of hospital visits and emergency room admissions for this demographic. The findings underline the potential of this approach in providing comprehensive and continuous care, ultimately improving the quality of life for children with special health care needs.

data.title: Vision Infrastructure Solutions Launches ELEVATE Initiative to Support Skilled Trades Founders
data.description: Entrepreneurs in fire suppression, material handling, and vertical transportation fields are welcomed to submit their applications. On March 26, 2026, Vision Infrastructure Solutions unveiled ELEVATE, a program aimed at assisting businesses in these sectors. This initiative is designed to provide support and resources to companies operating in these specific industries. If you are an entrepreneur in these areas, take advantage of this opportunity to apply and benefit from this industry development program.

data.title: Socialtrait Can Predict How Ideas Spread Before They Go Live
data.description: After successfully deploying Social Media Multiverse in enterprises for two years and securing a US patent, Socialtrait, a leading behavioral simulation AI company, has demonstrated its effectiveness with major corporations such as Target and other Fortune 100 companies. The foundation of Social Media Multiverse, based on these achievements, has solidified its position in the market. The company’s progress was highlighted in San Francisco on March 26, 2026, as announced by PRNewswire. This success showcases notable accomplishments in the industry, reinforcing Socialtrait’s reputation in the field of AI technology and enterprise solutions.

data.title: Express Wash Concepts Accelerates Hampton Roads Growth; Offers Free Signature Washes March 27-April 5 at New Holland Road Green Clean Express Auto Wash
data.description: Express Wash Concepts (EWC), a leading express car wash operator, has recently opened a new Green Clean Express Auto Wash location in Virginia Beach, VA. This expansion marks another milestone for EWC, known for its rapid growth and strong presence in the industry. The new facility, situated at 4245 Holland Road, is set to cater to the increasing demand for efficient car wash services in the area.

data.title: Octave holds Investor Day ahead of planned spin-off: Hexagon
data.description: Hexagon AB disclosed that Octave is set to host an Investor Day in New York today, in preparation for its impending spin-off. Pending approval from Hexagon's shareholders, the spin-off is projected to finalize by May 22, 2026. This strategic move aims to enhance focus and growth prospects for both entities.

data.title: Alchemy Pay and HTF Securities Successfully Uplift SFC Type 1 (Dealing in Securities) License
data.description: Hong Kong-based company Alchemy Pay, a top provider of fiat-crypto payment solutions, recently disclosed a strategic investment in licensed corporation HTF Securities Limited (Central Entity No.: BNO909). The collaboration is aimed at expanding their services and reach in the market. The announcement was made on March 26, 2026.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- DirectBooks/
data.description: DirectBooks has recently appointed Phil Armstrong as the new Board Chair and introduced senior advisors to their team. This announcement was made on 26-Mar-2026 through a press release by DirectBooks over PR Newswire. The addition of Phil Armstrong as the new Board Chair signifies a strategic move by the company. Along with the appointment, senior advisors have also been added to the team to enhance decision-making processes. This change is expected to bring a fresh perspective to the board and drive the company towards its goals. The new appointments aim to leverage the expertise and experience of the team members to ensure the company's success in the future.
